momentum_themes.headline: Memory & Storage Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Semiconductor memory and storage sectors showing explosive momentum with SNDK leading at +57% vs 21W. Energy minerals maintaining perfect bullish structure across all stocks.

sector_analysis.headline: Sector Rotation Into Defensives

strongest.note: Perfect bullish structure with all 11 stocks in Full Bull mode.
Small but perfectly positioned sector showing defensive strength.
Mining sector benefiting from commodity strength despite pullbacks.

weakest.note: Growth tech severely damaged with 90% of stocks in bearish mode.
Banking sector under pressure with 67% of stocks bearish despite rate environment.
Complete sector breakdown with all stocks in bearish structure.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation out of growth tech and financials into defensive energy and materials. Technology services showing severe institutional selling pressure.

items.text: Technology services sector showing 90% bearish participation - avoid momentum chasing
Financial sector weakness despite favorable rate environment suggests deeper issues
BTC Full Bear at -45% from fair value indicates maximum risk-off sentiment
Only 26% of stocks in Full Bull mode - selectivity critical in this environment
